case_title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. VS. EDUARDO ALLEGRETT et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT 339, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF EXHIBIT 1-2; SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC. SERVED MAR-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO
DECLARATION OF S. CLINTON WOODS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRETT, EDUARDO
